input_text: Penyokong parti pembangkang ni memang tak reti fikir, asyik percaya janji kosong je. Kesian betul.
reason: Dismissive generalisation of opposition supporters as incapable of thinking. Condescending but not hateful.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa penyokong pembangkang perlu menilai janji yang dibuat dengan lebih kritis.

input_text: Orang undi parti tu semua jenis senang kena tipu la. Tak ada akal ke?
reason: Insulting intelligence of voters of a specific party. Rude political dismissal without hate speech.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa pengundi parti tersebut patut lebih teliti menilai janji yang dibuat.

input_text: Supporter kerajaan ni buta ke? Semua dasar gagal pun masih nak sokong.
reason: Calls government supporters blind. Rude dismissal of political opponents without crossing into hate.
suggested_rewrite: Saya harap penyokong kerajaan boleh lebih kritis menilai dasar yang kurang berkesan.

input_text: Pengundi kawasan luar bandar ni memang senang nak bodek la. Bagi sikit duit terus undi.
reason: Stereotype about rural voters being easily bribed. Dismissive and condescending toward a demographic group.
suggested_rewrite: Isu politik wang dalam kawasan luar bandar perlu ditangani secara serius oleh semua pihak.

input_text: Kalau nak compare Malaysia dengan Singapore, memang la kita kalah teruk. Sistem kita semua outdated.
reason: Rude blanket dismissal of all Malaysian systems as inferior to Singapore. Unproductive self-deprecation.
suggested_rewrite: Ada beberapa aspek di mana Malaysia boleh belajar daripada amalan terbaik Singapura untuk penambahbaikan.

input_text: Singapore punya public transport boleh tahan, kita punya macam sampah. Malu betul jadi Malaysian.
reason: Describes Malaysian transport as 'sampah' (trash) and expresses shame. Rude comparison but not hate speech.
suggested_rewrite: Pengangkutan awam Singapura memang lebih cekap. Malaysia perlu tingkatkan kualiti perkhidmatan ini.

input_text: Mangsa ragut tu pun satu, jalan sorang malam-malam buat apa? Memang cari nahas la.
reason: Blames snatch theft victim for walking alone at night. Mild victim-blaming that shifts responsibility from the perpetrator.
suggested_rewrite: Memang malang apa yang berlaku. Kita semua perlu lebih berhati-hati dan kerajaan perlu perbaiki keselamatan awam.

input_text: Kena scam online tu sebab tamak la. Dah tau terlalu murah mesti tipu, degil jugak nak beli.
reason: Blames online scam victims as greedy. Dismissive toward fraud victims instead of acknowledging criminal responsibility.
suggested_rewrite: Penipuan online semakin berleluasa. Kita perlu lebih berhati-hati dan pihak berkuasa perlu tindakan tegas.

input_text: Derma kat orang miskin pastu post kat social media. Mesti nak viral je tu, bukan ikhlas pun.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of charitable acts as clout-chasing. Questions sincerity without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun ada yang berkongsi di media sosial, yang penting bantuan sampai kepada yang memerlukan.

input_text: Artis tu buat charity event memang nak show off je la. Kalau betul ikhlas buat senyap-senyap.
reason: Dismisses celebrity charity as showing off. Sarcastic assumption about motives without basis.
suggested_rewrite: Walau apa pun motifnya, usaha kebajikan tetap memberi manfaat kepada yang memerlukan.

input_text: Perempuan pakai seksi jangan salahkan orang tengok la. Dah provoke sendiri.
reason: Blames women for attracting unwanted attention based on clothing. Mild victim-blaming tied to modesty policing.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak berpakaian mengikut pilihan mereka tanpa diganggu. Tanggungjawab menghormati terletak pada semua pihak.

input_text: Pakai tudung tapi perangai macam tu jugak, baik tak payah pakai.
reason: Judges someone's religious expression based on behaviour. Dismissive commentary about dress code and piety.
suggested_rewrite: Cara berpakaian adalah pilihan peribadi seseorang dan tidak sepatutnya dihakimi oleh orang lain.

input_text: Diversity hiring ni memang buat standard company turun la. Ambil orang sebab warna kulit bukan sebab skill.
reason: Dismisses diversity initiatives as lowering standards. Implies certain groups lack skills, stereotype-adjacent.
suggested_rewrite: Program kepelbagaian di tempat kerja perlu dilaksanakan dengan teliti supaya merit dan inklusiviti seimbang.

input_text: Quota student masuk universiti memang standard rendah la. Kalau betul pandai tak perlu kuota.
reason: Dismissive generalisation that quota students are less capable. Undermines affirmative action recipients without nuance.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kuota perlu dinilai semula untuk memastikan semua pelajar mendapat sokongan yang sewajarnya.

input_text: Budak IPTA tu masuk sebab kuota je, bukan sebab otak. Pastu kerja pun tak reti buat.
reason: Implies public university students admitted via quota are incompetent. Dismissive and demeaning.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti pendidikan di IPTA patut diperkukuh supaya semua graduan berdaya saing tanpa mengira cara kemasukan.

input_text: Cakap English pun pelat gila, malu lah sikit. Kalau tak pandai jangan la cuba.
reason: Mocks someone's English pronunciation. Shames language proficiency, discouraging bilingual efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Menguasai bahasa tambahan memerlukan masa. Kita patut menggalakkan usaha bertutur dalam pelbagai bahasa.

input_text: Graduan private uni memang second class la. Employer pun pandang sebelah mata je.
reason: Dismisses all private university graduates as inferior. Blanket insult to educational background.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap institusi ada kekuatan tersendiri. Kualiti graduan bergantung kepada usaha individu bukan hanya institusi.

input_text: Orang yang tak habis degree tu memang takkan maju dalam hidup. Nak compare dengan orang belajar tinggi?
reason: Dismisses people without degrees as unable to succeed. Elitist and rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Kejayaan datang dalam pelbagai bentuk. Ijazah bukan satu-satunya penanda kemajuan seseorang.

input_text: Supporter PH ni macam cult la, pemimpin buat salah pun tetap defend. Kesian.
reason: Compares political supporters to a cult. Dismissive and condescending toward a political group.
suggested_rewrite: Penting untuk semua penyokong politik kekal kritis dan objektif terhadap kepimpinan masing-masing.

input_text: Penyokong PN memang hidup dalam dunia sendiri la. Fakta depan mata pun tak nampak.
reason: Insults PN supporters as delusional. Rude political dismissal without incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Penting bagi semua pihak untuk menilai fakta secara objektif tanpa terlalu terikat dengan mana-mana parti.

input_text: Jiran Singapura tu memang sombong la, ingat duit boleh beli segala. Padahal negara kecik je.
reason: Rude generalisation about Singaporeans as arrogant and dismissive of their country size.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia dan Singapura mempunyai kelebihan masing-masing. Hubungan baik antara kedua-dua negara penting.

input_text: Kemalangan tu salah dia sendiri la. Siapa suruh bawa motor laju macam orang gila.
reason: Blames accident victim for reckless driving. Dismissive of someone who may be seriously injured.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan jalan raya tanggungjawab semua pihak. Semoga mangsa cepat sembuh.

input_text: Company buat CSR event semua sandiwara je la. Tax deduction je tujuan sebenar.
reason: Dismisses all CSR as dishonest. Sarcastic cynicism about corporate charity without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun ada pelbagai motivasi, program CSR tetap memberi impak positif kepada masyarakat.

input_text: Orang bagi sedekah depan kamera memang menunjuk la tu. Nak riak je lebih.
reason: Accuses those who give charity publicly as showing off (riak). Dismissive assumption about intentions.
suggested_rewrite: Mungkin ada yang berkongsi untuk menginspirasi orang lain. Yang penting bantuan sampai kepada yang memerlukan.

input_text: Eh perempuan tu pakai macam tu pergi masjid? Tak tau malu ke? Zaman sekarang memang dah rosak.
reason: Shames a woman's attire at a religious venue. Rude moral policing tied to dress code.
suggested_rewrite: Mungkin kita boleh memberi teguran secara berhikmah jika berkenaan adab di tempat ibadat.

input_text: HR department sekarang asyik nak push diversity agenda. Biarlah hire based on merit la, tak payah pandang kaum.
reason: Frames diversity initiatives as anti-meritocratic. Dismissive tone that undermines inclusion efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Penting untuk syarikat mengimbangi kepelbagaian dengan merit supaya kedua-dua objektif tercapai.

input_text: Budak sekolah kebangsaan English hancur gila. Pastu nak bersaing dengan budak international school? Mimpi la.
reason: Mocks national school students' English. Dismissive comparison with international school students.
suggested_rewrite: Penguasaan bahasa Inggeris di sekolah kebangsaan perlu ditingkatkan melalui pelaburan dalam kurikulum dan latihan guru.

input_text: Student masuk dengan matrikulasi punya result memang tak boleh harap la. Standard lain sangat.
reason: Dismisses matriculation students as unreliable. Implies different admission pathways produce inferior students.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kemasukan universiti boleh diperbaiki untuk memastikan semua pelajar bersedia menghadapi cabaran pengajian.

input_text: Gaji minimum Malaysia pun tak boleh compare dengan Singapore. Kita memang hopeless la dalam ekonomi ni.
reason: Defeatist dismissal of Malaysian economy using comparison with Singapore. Unproductive negativity.
suggested_rewrite: Memang ada jurang ekonomi antara Malaysia dan Singapura, tetapi Malaysia mempunyai potensi untuk terus berkembang.

input_text: Bini kena pukul sebab mulut tak reti jaga la. Lelaki pun ada had kesabaran.
reason: Blames domestic violence victim for provoking the abuser. Mild victim-blaming that normalises violence.
suggested_rewrite: Keganasan rumah tangga tidak pernah boleh dibenarkan. Mangsa perlu dilindungi dan pelaku perlu dipertanggungjawabkan.

input_text: Melayu yang vote DAP tu memang dah lupa asal usul la. Pengkhianat bangsa sendiri.
reason: Labels Malay DAP voters as race traitors. Dismissive and divisive but stays within political rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap rakyat berhak memilih parti yang mereka rasa terbaik tanpa dilabel berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Parking double pun patut la kena saman. Sendiri bodoh buat salah, jangan nak menangis pulak.
reason: Uses 'bodoh' to describe someone who got a parking fine. Rude and dismissive rather than empathetic.
suggested_rewrite: Memang penting ikut peraturan parking. Saman adalah peringatan untuk semua supaya lebih berhemah.

input_text: Pekerja foreign worker tu jangan harap la pandai cakap BM. Datang sini pun tak reti hormati bahasa kita.
reason: Dismissive of foreign workers' language abilities. Rude generalisation without accounting for systemic barriers.
suggested_rewrite: Mungkin program bahasa boleh disediakan untuk membantu pekerja asing berkomunikasi dengan lebih baik.

input_text: Lecturer universiti tu cakap English macam budak darjah satu. Malu betul la university kita.
reason: Mocks a university lecturer's English proficiency. Rude language shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Kemahiran bahasa Inggeris di kalangan tenaga pengajar boleh ditingkatkan melalui program pembangunan profesional.

input_text: Orang yang pakai branded bag tapi gaji minimum memang bodoh la. Then buat GoFundMe bila emergency. Clown.
reason: Mocks people who buy luxury items on low salaries and shames their financial choices. Rude and judgmental.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan kewangan peribadi adalah penting. Daripada menghakimi, mungkin kita boleh menggalakkan literasi kewangan.

input_text: These opposition supporters are really something else. Can't even think for themselves, just follow blindly like sheep.
reason: Dehumanises opposition supporters by comparing them to sheep. Dismissive political commentary.
suggested_rewrite: It's important for all political supporters to critically evaluate their party's policies rather than follow without question.

input_text: Compared to Singapore, our healthcare system is a joke. Everything in Malaysia is third-world standard lah.
reason: Calls Malaysian healthcare a joke and labels country as third-world. Rude comparison dismissing all achievements.
suggested_rewrite: While Singapore's healthcare has certain advantages, Malaysia's system also has strengths that can be further improved.

input_text: She got robbed because she was flashing her iPhone around. What did she expect walking through that area?
reason: Blames robbery victim for displaying a phone. Shifts responsibility from criminal to victim.
suggested_rewrite: It's unfortunate she was robbed. Everyone deserves to feel safe, and we need better enforcement in high-risk areas.

input_text: All these influencers doing charity for content. Not a single one actually cares about the people they're helping.
reason: Sweeping dismissal of all influencer charity as insincere. Sarcastic and assumes the worst without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: While some may question the motives, influencer charity campaigns can still create real positive impact for those in need.

input_text: Women who dress provocatively at the office shouldn't complain about getting stared at. It's common sense lah.
reason: Blames women for receiving unwanted attention based on clothing. Polices dress code and excuses inappropriate behaviour.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone deserves a respectful workplace regardless of their attire. Staring and harassment are never acceptable.

input_text: Why do we need diversity quotas at work? Just hire the best person for the job. This whole thing is reverse discrimination.
reason: Dismisses diversity initiatives as reverse discrimination. Petty complaint that ignores systemic inequality.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace diversity and merit can coexist. Thoughtful implementation ensures both inclusion and competence.

input_text: Can't even speak proper English but want to apply for management position. Some people really have no self-awareness.
reason: Mocks someone's English proficiency and ties it to career worthiness. Rude and exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: Language skills can be developed. Management ability depends on many factors beyond language proficiency alone.

input_text: Quota students drag down the whole university ranking. They shouldn't be there if they can't keep up.
reason: Blames quota students for university ranking issues. Dismissive generalisation about affirmative action beneficiaries.
suggested_rewrite: Universities should provide adequate support systems so all students, regardless of admission pathway, can succeed.

input_text: PH voters are so naive it's almost cute. They actually believe those empty promises every single time.
reason: Patronising dismissal of PH voters as naive. Condescending political commentary.
suggested_rewrite: All voters should hold their chosen parties accountable for the promises made during elections.

input_text: Malaysian airports compared to Changi? Please lah, don't embarrass ourselves. It's like comparing a warung to a 5-star hotel.
reason: Demeaning comparison of Malaysian airports to Changi using warung analogy. Rude national self-deprecation.
suggested_rewrite: Changi Airport sets a high benchmark. KLIA has room for improvement but also has its own strengths worth recognising.

input_text: If you got cheated in a love scam, honestly you deserve it. How gullible can you be?
reason: Blames love scam victims and calls them gullible. Dismissive of emotional manipulation tactics used by scammers.
suggested_rewrite: Love scams exploit human emotions and can happen to anyone. Victims deserve support, not blame.

input_text: All those donation drives by corporations are just tax write-offs. Don't be fooled by their PR stunts.
reason: Dismisses all corporate donations as self-serving. Cynical generalisation without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: While tax benefits may play a role, corporate donations still provide real assistance to communities in need.

input_text: Girls wearing short skirts to campus then complain about catcalling. Make up your mind lah.
reason: Blames catcalling victims based on clothing choice. Mild victim-blaming with modesty policing undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Catcalling is harassment regardless of what someone wears. Everyone has the right to feel safe on campus.

input_text: These new hires from the diversity program can't even handle basic tasks. What a waste of resources.
reason: Blames diversity hires for being incompetent. Dismissive generalisation that undermines inclusion.
suggested_rewrite: New hires from any program may need onboarding support. Proper training benefits all employees equally.

input_text: People who didn't finish SPM giving life advice on TikTok is the funniest thing. Stay in your lane lah.
reason: Mocks people without SPM for sharing advice. Dismissive of lived experience and non-academic knowledge.
suggested_rewrite: Valuable life lessons can come from diverse experiences, not just formal education.

input_text: Matrikulasi students getting into medicine while STPM students with better grades get rejected. The system is rigged.
reason: Implies matriculation students are less deserving. Dismissive framing of the admission system as rigged.
suggested_rewrite: The university admission system could benefit from greater transparency to ensure fairness for all qualified applicants.

input_text: Honestly Malaysian drivers are the worst in ASEAN. No wonder our road death stats are so high. Hopeless.
reason: Labels all Malaysian drivers as the worst. Rude generalisation with defeatist tone.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety in Malaysia needs improvement. Better enforcement and education could significantly reduce accident rates.

input_text: BN supporters still living in the 90s. Wake up lah uncle auntie, your party already irrelevant.
reason: Age-related dismissal of BN supporters as outdated. Condescending political mockery.
suggested_rewrite: Every political party has supporters with their own valid reasons. Respectful engagement leads to better discourse.

input_text: Our education system produces workers, not thinkers. Singapore produces leaders while we produce followers. Sad reality.
reason: Disparages entire Malaysian education system in comparison to Singapore. Reductive and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Both countries have different educational strengths. Malaysia can enhance critical thinking through curriculum reforms.

input_text: Got scammed buying fake branded goods? Serves you right for trying to look rich on a budget.
reason: Mocks and blames victim of counterfeit goods scam. Dismissive and judgmental.
suggested_rewrite: Counterfeit goods are a widespread problem. Consumers should be aware, and authorities need to crack down on sellers.

input_text: These government scholars come back and can't even write a proper email in English. Tax money well spent.
reason: Mocks government scholars' English ability. Sarcastic dismissal of publicly funded education.
suggested_rewrite: Scholarship programmes could include stronger language and communication training to better prepare graduates for the workforce.

input_text: Why do they keep hiring based on race instead of talent? No wonder Malaysian companies can't compete globally.
reason: Frames race-based hiring as the reason for lack of competitiveness. Oversimplified and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: A balanced approach to hiring that values both diversity and competence can strengthen Malaysian companies' global standing.

input_text: These PAS supporters want to bring Malaysia back to the stone age lah. So backwards thinking.
reason: Labels PAS supporters as backward and wanting to regress the country. Rude political dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: Different political visions should be debated respectfully. Dismissing supporters of any party as backward is unproductive.

input_text: My colleague got promoted because of diversity, not because she's good. Everyone in the office knows it.
reason: Undermines colleague's promotion by attributing it solely to diversity. Dismissive and potentially gender-biased.
suggested_rewrite: Promotions should be based on clear criteria. If there are concerns about the process, they should be raised constructively.

input_text: Malaysian graduates can't even write a proper resume. No wonder Singapore companies prefer their own people.
reason: Insults all Malaysian graduates' resume skills and unfavourably compares to Singapore. Rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Resume writing and career readiness skills could be strengthened in Malaysian higher education to improve graduate employability.

input_text: 这些反对党的支持者真的是没脑子，什么话都信。可悲。
reason: Calls opposition supporters brainless. Dismissive political insult in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 每位选民都应该理性评估各党派的政策，而不是被情绪左右。

input_text: 马来西亚跟新加坡比？算了吧，完全不是一个档次的。什么都比人家差。
reason: Dismisses Malaysia as entirely inferior to Singapore. Rude blanket comparison.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚和新加坡各有优势，我们可以互相学习，取长补短。

input_text: 被抢劫还不是因为自己大半夜一个人走？自己不小心怪谁。
reason: Blames robbery victim for walking alone at night. Victim-blaming in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 被抢劫是不幸的事，治安问题需要当局加强改善，不应归咎于受害者。

input_text: 那些网红做慈善就是为了流量，根本不是真心帮人。别被骗了。
reason: Accuses all influencers of insincere charity. Cynical dismissal without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: 虽然有些人质疑动机，但网红的慈善活动确实能为有需要的人带来帮助。

input_text: 穿成那样去上班，被人说闲话也是活该啦。自己不注意形象怪谁。
reason: Blames someone for gossip about their workplace attire. Modesty policing in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 职场着装虽有规范，但评价他人穿着不应演变为人身攻击或闲言碎语。

input_text: 公司搞什么多元化招聘，不就是降低标准嘛。能力才是最重要的。
reason: Dismisses diversity hiring as lowering standards. Anti-diversity sentiment in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 多元化招聘和能力并不矛盾，合理的实施方案可以兼顾两者。

input_text: 靠配额进大学的学生，水平真的不行。以后出来工作也是拖后腿。
reason: Generalises quota students as low quality and future liabilities. Dismissive and demeaning.
suggested_rewrite: 大学应提供更多学术支持，确保所有学生都能达到毕业要求和职场标准。

input_text: 连马来语都说不好还敢说自己是马来西亚人？搞笑。
reason: Gatekeeps Malaysian identity based on Malay language proficiency. Rude and exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚是多语言国家，国民身份不应仅以一种语言的熟练程度来衡量。

input_text: 华校出来的学生英文都很烂，难怪找工作那么难。
reason: Mocks Chinese school graduates' English. Dismissive generalisation about educational background.
suggested_rewrite: 不同源流学校各有优势。英语能力可以通过后续学习不断提升。

input_text: 执政党的支持者就是被洗脑了，跟他们讲道理完全没用。
reason: Labels ruling party supporters as brainwashed. Dismissive political insult.
suggested_rewrite: 不同政治立场的人之间应保持尊重和理性对话，避免互相贴标签。

input_text: 新加坡的公务员效率那么高，看看我们的？只会坐着喝茶等下班。
reason: Rude comparison stereotyping Malaysian civil servants as lazy versus Singapore. Dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚公共服务效率可以进一步提升，参考新加坡的经验来改进流程。

input_text: 没有学历的人就不要出来发表意见了，说出来的话都没有深度。
reason: Dismisses opinions of people without academic qualifications. Elitist and exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人的经验和观点都有价值，不应以学历高低来评判意见的质量。

input_text: STPM成绩那么好却进不了大学，配额制度真的太不公平了。那些配额生凭什么？
reason: Dismisses quota system and questions worthiness of quota students. Resentful tone about affirmative action.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度的公平性值得讨论。应确保所有合格学生都有平等的入学机会。

input_text: 这种quota制度就是不公平。凭什么成绩差的能进，成绩好的被拒绝？太荒谬了。
reason: Calls quota system absurd and implies beneficiaries have poor grades. Dismissive of affirmative action rationale.
suggested_rewrite: 配额制度的公平性值得社会讨论。应确保制度既照顾弱势群体，又不忽视其他优秀学生。

input_text: 每次选举那些乡下人就被骗。给一包米就投票了，真的是没救了。
reason: Stereotypes rural voters as easily bribed with rice. Condescending and dismissive in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 选举贿赂是需要严肃对待的问题，应通过法律手段解决，而非责怪选民。

input_text: எதிர்க்கட்சி ஆதரவாளர்கள் மூளை இல்லாதவர்கள். எதையும் யோசிக்காம ஆமா போடுவாங்க.
reason: Calls opposition supporters brainless in Tamil. Dismissive political insult.
suggested_rewrite: எல்லா அரசியல் ஆதரவாளர்களும் தங்கள் கட்சியின் கொள்கைகளை விமர்சன பூர்வமாக மதிப்பிட வேண்டும்.

input_text: சிங்கப்பூர் பக்கத்தில் இருந்தும் நம்ம நாடு ஒண்ணும் கத்துக்கல. எல்லாமே மோசம்.
reason: Dismisses Malaysia as having learnt nothing from Singapore. Blanket negative assessment.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியா சிங்கப்பூரிடம் இருந்து சில விஷயங்களை கற்றுக்கொள்ளலாம், ஆனால் நம் நாட்டுக்கும் பல சிறப்புகள் உள்ளன.

input_text: திருடன் வீட்டுக்குள் வந்ததற்கு யாரை குறை சொல்வது? கதவை பூட்டாம போனவனை தான்.
reason: Blames burglary victim for not locking the door. Victim-blaming rather than addressing crime.
suggested_rewrite: திருட்டு சம்பவங்கள் குறித்து போலீஸ் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க வேண்டும். பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்களை குறை சொல்வது சரியல்ல.

input_text: பணக்காரன் தர்மம் செய்யறது எல்லாம் காட்டிக்கிறதுக்கு தான். உண்மையான கருணை இல்ல.
reason: Dismisses all wealthy people's charity as showing off. Cynical generalisation in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: காரணம் எதுவாக இருந்தாலும், தர்ம செயல்கள் தேவையுள்ளவர்களுக்கு உதவுகின்றன என்பதை மறக்கக்கூடாது.

input_text: இந்த பொண்ணுங்க குறுகலா உடை போட்டுட்டு யாராவது பார்த்தா கோவப்படுறாங்க. என்ன லாஜிக்?
reason: Blames women's clothing for unwanted attention in Tamil. Modesty policing and victim-blaming.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொருவரும் தங்கள் விருப்பப்படி உடை அணிய உரிமை உண்டு. மரியாதையாக நடப்பது அனைவரின் பொறுப்பு.

input_text: கோட்டா மாணவர்கள் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தின் தரத்தை குறைக்கிறார்கள். தகுதி இல்லாம வந்தவங்க.
reason: Labels quota students as unqualified and blames them for lowering university standards. Dismissive in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: பல்கலைக்கழகங்கள் அனைத்து மாணவர்களுக்கும் சரியான கல்வி ஆதரவை வழங்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: தமிழ் பள்ளியில படிச்சவங்களுக்கு ஆங்கிலம் வராது. அதனால தான் நல்ல வேலை கிடைக்காது.
reason: Mocks Tamil school graduates' English and ties it to job prospects. Dismissive of vernacular education.
suggested_rewrite: மொழித்திறனை மேம்படுத்த பல வழிகள் உள்ளன. கல்வி பின்னணி ஒருவரின் திறமையை தீர்மானிப்பதில்லை.

input_text: ஆளும் கட்சி ஆதரவாளர்கள் கண்ணை மூடிக்கிட்டு ஆதரிக்கிறாங்க. மூடர்கள்.
reason: Calls ruling party supporters fools who blindly support. Rude political dismissal in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து அரசியல் ஆதரவாளர்களும் தங்கள் கட்சியின் செயல்களை பகுத்தறிவுடன் மதிப்பீடு செய்ய வேண்டும்.

input_text: வேலை பார்க்க தெரியாதவங்க எல்லாம் diversity quota-வில வருவாங்க. அதனால தான் quality குறையுது.
reason: Blames diversity quota for bringing in incompetent workers in Tamil. Dismissive generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: பல்வேறு திட்டங்கள் மூலம் வருபவர்களுக்கும் சரியான பயிற்சி கொடுத்தால் அனைவரும் சிறப்பாக செயல்பட முடியும்.

input_text: டிகிரி இல்லாதவங்க என்ன தெரிஞ்சுக்க போறாங்க? அவங்க கருத்துக்கு மதிப்பே இல்ல.
reason: Dismisses opinions of people without degrees as worthless in Tamil. Elitist and exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வித்தகுதி மட்டும் ஒருவரின் அறிவையோ அனுபவத்தையோ தீர்மானிப்பதில்லை. அனைவரின் கருத்துகளும் மதிப்புக்குரியவை.

input_text: SPM pun tak lepas tapi nak bagi advice dekat TikTok. Aiyo, these people really ah, no self-awareness langsung.
reason: Mixed language shaming of people without SPM for giving advice online. Dismissive of non-academic knowledge.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone can share their life experiences. Formal qualifications are not the only source of valuable knowledge.

input_text: Singapore punya MRT so efficient, kita punya LRT selalu rosak. Malaysia memang hopeless case la honestly.
reason: Mixed language rude comparison calling Malaysia hopeless versus Singapore transport. Defeatist.
suggested_rewrite: Singapore's MRT system has its merits. Malaysia's rail network is improving and continued investment will make a difference.

input_text: Kesian la orang kena snatch theft, tapi also your fault la jalan sorang-sorang malam buta macam tu.
reason: Mixed language victim-blaming for snatch theft. Pretends sympathy then shifts blame to the victim.
suggested_rewrite: Snatch theft is a serious crime. We should focus on improving public safety rather than blaming the victims.

input_text: Charity event semua for show je la. These rich people just want the publicity, bukan genuinely nak help pun.
reason: Mixed language dismissal of charity events as PR stunts. Sarcastic and cynical without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: While motivations may vary, charity events still provide real help to communities in need.

input_text: Perempuan pakai revealing clothes pergi office pastu complain orang pandang. Aiya, common sense la sikit.
reason: Mixed language victim-blaming and modesty policing. Excuses unwanted staring based on clothing.
suggested_rewrite: Professional environments should focus on respect for all colleagues regardless of personal attire choices.

input_text: Company I baru masuk asyik push diversity hiring. End up team semua underperform sebab hire based on race bukan skill.
reason: Blames diversity hiring for team underperformance. Mixed language dismissal of inclusion initiatives.
suggested_rewrite: Effective diversity programs combine inclusive hiring with proper training and support to ensure team success.

input_text: Budak quota ni masuk uni tapi English pun hancur. How to compete with international students macam ni?
reason: Mocks quota students' English and questions their ability to compete. Mixed language dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: Universities should offer strong language support programmes to help all students build competitive communication skills.

input_text: Supporter BN still nak pertahan that party? Wake up la uncle, zaman tu dah berlalu. Tak malu ke?
reason: Mixed language age-related dismissal of BN supporters. Patronising political commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Political loyalty is a personal choice. Healthy democracies benefit from diverse viewpoints and respectful debate.

input_text: Accident kat highway tu sebab dia texting while driving la obviously. Padan muka, nasib tak libatkan orang lain.
reason: Says accident victim deserved it. Mixed language victim-blaming for distracted driving.
suggested_rewrite: Road accidents are tragic regardless of cause. This is a reminder of the importance of safe driving practices.

input_text: Local degree holder nak compare dengan overseas grad? Please la, jangan nak perasan. Level lain.
reason: Dismisses local degree holders as inferior to overseas graduates. Mixed language elitism.
suggested_rewrite: Both local and overseas degrees have value. What matters most is the individual's skills and work ethic.

input_text: Influencer tu post video derma kat homeless, caption semua touching. But we all know it's for likes je kan.
reason: Assumes influencer charity videos are purely for social media engagement. Mixed language cynicism.
suggested_rewrite: Whatever the intention, sharing acts of kindness can inspire others to help those in need too.

input_text: Pakai baju ketat pergi kenduri kahwin, makcik-makcik semua pandang. Serves her right la, should know better.
reason: Mixed language shaming of someone's outfit at a wedding. Validates social policing of women's dress.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to dress as they choose. It's better to focus on celebrating the occasion together.

input_text: Opposition voters dari bandar je la, tak tau reality rakyat kampung. Cakap besar tapi hidup dalam bubble sendiri.
reason: Dismisses urban opposition voters as out of touch. Mixed language political stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Urban and rural voters each have their own valid concerns. Bridging this gap requires mutual understanding.

input_text: 新加坡的hawker food比马来西亚的好吃多了lah. Our food standard dah turun teruk.
reason: Mixed language (zh/ms/en) rude comparison dismissing Malaysian food quality versus Singapore.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚和新加坡的小贩美食各有特色，两国的饮食文化都值得欣赏。

input_text: Kerja kat government sector semua slow macam siput. No wonder la Singapore laughs at us. Malu.
reason: Calls all government workers slow and says Singapore laughs at Malaysia. Mixed language rude generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Public sector efficiency can be improved through digitalisation and process reforms, as many countries are doing.
